title: B.O.R.E Craft Reborn
description:
Minecraft Beta 1.21?

Enjoy an enhanced Beta 1.7.3 experience with extra features.

A nice mix of Modern & Beta.
body:
# Summary

### B.O.R.E(Before Official Release Enhanced) Craft Reborn

Brings both the Mechanics & Visuals of Beta 1.7.3 to Minecraft 1.21 with some added features that don't break the Beta Minecraft Feel.

### This Pack is very optimised.

## Beta Features

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- Old Combat
- Old Visuals & Sounds
- True Darkness (To Simulate the old lighting)
- No Hunger Bar + Instant Eat
- Mobs walk on rails
- No Raw Ore
- Old Swimming
- Old World Gen(Make sure to select World Type: Moderner Beta)
- Minecart Boosting
- No Enchanting & Experience
- Removed Enchant Books (Enchanted Items can still be found as loot)
- Classic Window Icon
- Craftable Enchanted Golden Apple

</details>

## Additional Features


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Interdimensional Map Markers
- Better Recipe Book (The Question Mark in the inventory is the Recipe Book)
- Enchant Icons
- Optional Datapacks
- Better Map Colors + Recipes
- Lily Pads get pushed aside by boats

### Secret Features

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Herobrine Added (Summon him to your world using the altar)
- Render Distance Capped at 8
- Difficulty Locked to Hard

</details>

</details>
